_comment_prompt_file: Relative path to prompt. Options: Prompt_Iterations/prompt_2.json | Prompt_Iterations/prompt_2_db2.json | Prompt_Iterations/prompt.json
_comment_model: GitHub Models ID. Options: gpt-4.1 | o3 | claude-3-5-sonnet | meta-llama-3.1-70b-instruct
_comment_output_dir: All workflow outputs land in <output_dir>/<model>/ mirroring the Workflows/ folder structure
